results.title: Making India a Centre of excellence pilot training: Simaero CEO Nicolas Moute
results.description: India will need over 22,000 pilots by 2030. Pilot training is expensive and majority of airlines send their pilots abroad for training. Simaero to invest $100 million in India for training 5,000 pilots.

results.title: South Gyeongsang Launches 106-km Nakdong River Waterfront Study With 8 Cities
results.description: South Gyeongsang Province launched a study to manage 106 km of the Nakdong River waterfront, partnering with eight cities and counties through June 2028 under a new cooperation framework.

results.title: Gatwick Airport expansion plan explained - what it means for Londoners
results.description: Gatwick Airport plans to bring its standby runway into routine use, boosting Gatwick passenger capacity from 43 million to 75 million and increasing flights to 386,000 per year

results.title: BNB News: Binance Faces EU Suspension as Pepeto Presale Crosses $10.3 million Ahead of Listing
results.description: Binance told customers in four EU countries that it will suspend services on July 1 after its MiCA license application failed. BNB dropped to $555 while the exchange looks for a new path into Europe through France. The BNB news
